title: 3rd Eye Introduces Verif-Eye for Rear Loaders - Connecting Fleets to their Customers While Keeping Operators Connected to Their Truck
text: Positive Service Verification and Asset Management Tools for Rear Load Refuse Collection Vehicles Help Fleet Owners Provide Automated Customer Service and Route Service Validation in Real-Time DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- 3rd Eye, part of Environmental Solutions Group (ESG) and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the expansion of their Verif-Eye® service verification and asset management module to include a version custom-tailored for Rear Load Refuse Collection Vehicles.

title: Blue Bite Named an NFC Forum 2022 Innovation Award Winner for Most Innovative Use of NFC Technology
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Blue Bite, part of Markem-Imaje and Dover (NYSE: DOV), and a global leader in connected products technology, was recently named an NFC Forum 2022 Innovation Award winner for "Most Innovative Use of NFC.

title: Dover's (DOV) Arm Inks Deal to Offer Complete Fuel Solutions
text: Dover (DOV) business unit DFS's latest partnership with Bottomline will provide combined fuel management solution to customers that can save retailers' costs by 5-10% through automated operations.

title: Is Dover (DOV) a Suitable Stock for Value Investors?
text: Is Dover (DOV) a great pick from the value investor's perspective right now? Read on to know more.

title: Dover Fueling Solutions Collaborates with Bottomline to Offer a Complete End-to-End Fuel Management Solution
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industry, today announced its collaboration with Bottomline, a Dutch supplier of software, planning and transport services in the oil and gas sector, to offer a complete, end-to-end fuel management solution.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain Dover (DOV) Stock For Now
text: Dover (DOV) is benefiting from solid order trends, strong demand across end markets and cost-control actions despite supply chain challenges and escalating costs.

title: Inpro/Seal Introduces VBMag Bearing Isolator to Address Growing Need for Bearing Protection in Flooded and Mist Applications
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Inpro/Seal, part of Dover Precision Components and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the launch of its new magnetic bearing isolator, VBMag™, which utilizes magnetic force to create a liquid-tight seal and protect against lubrication loss and contamination ingress in challenging applications, such as flooded, high oil splash or oil mist environments.
